repo.description: ABAP part for running abaplint on ABAP backend

terms.context_snippet: This project enables [abaplint](https://abaplint.org) to be run in the context of SAP Code Inspector (SCI), allowing immediate feedback to the ABAP developers in their standard editor, SE24 / SE80 / SE38 / ABAP in Eclipse. And also works seamlessly with other places where the co…
